NORESTFORTHEDAMNED.NAME: No Rest for the Damned
NORESTFORTHEDAMNED.DESCRIPTION: No Rest for the Damned Description

SPECIFICRULES.PREVIOUSANCESTRY: Which ancestry were you before becoming a vampire?

FORMERANCESTRYMODE.NAME: Use expanded former ancestry sync
FORMERANCESTRYMODE.HINT: On applies the selected former ancestry's chassis details to the vampire ancestry. Off uses only the ancestry's built-in former ancestry support.

HUNGERTRACKING.NAME: Enable vampire hunger tracking
HUNGERTRACKING.HINT: Displays a hunger panel on vampire player characters and stores hunger values on actor flags.

DRAINED.NAME: Default Hunger threshold: Drained
DRAINED.HINT: Hunger value at which vampire characters begin gaining drained.

CONFUSED.NAME: Default Hunger threshold: Confused
CONFUSED.HINT: Hunger value at which vampire characters begin gaining confused.

DEATH.NAME: Default Hunger threshold: Dying
DEATH.HINT: Hunger value at which vampire characters begin gaining dying.

FORMERANCESTRYMODE.INTRO: Vampire former ancestry supports two modes.
FORMERANCESTRYMODE.RULEELEMENTS_BODY: Uses only the vampire ancestry's existing former ancestry support. This is simpler, but it does not copy boosts, flaws, speed, languages, or other ancestry chassis details.
FORMERANCESTRYMODE.JAVASCRIPT_BODY: Applies the selected former ancestry's chassis details to the vampire ancestry and keeps them in sync when the former ancestry selection changes.
FORMERANCESTRYMODE.SETTING_LOCATION: You can switch this in Configure Settings > Module Settings > PF2e Vamps and Dhamps.

VAMPIRE.LABEL: Vampire
VAMPIRE.DESCRIPTION: This trait marks feats, abilities, and creatures associated with the vampire ancestry.

JIANGSHI.LABEL: Jiang-Shi
JIANGSHI.DESCRIPTION: A member of the jiang-shi vampire lineage.

MOROI.LABEL: Moroi
MOROI.DESCRIPTION: A member of the moroi vampire lineage.

NOSFERATU.LABEL: Nosferatu
NOSFERATU.DESCRIPTION: A member of the nosferatu vampire lineage.

STRIGOI.LABEL: Strigoi
STRIGOI.DESCRIPTION: A member of the strigoi vampire lineage.

VETALARANA.LABEL: Vetalarana
VETALARANA.DESCRIPTION: A member of the vetalarana vampire lineage.

VRYKOLAKAS.LABEL: Vrykolakas
VRYKOLAKAS.DESCRIPTION: A member of the vrykolakas vampire lineage.

HUNGER.LABEL: Hunger
HUNGER.DESCRIPTION: This action requires a Hunger check which is a DC 13 Flat check. If you succeed, you may continue the action with no consequences. If you fail, your Hunger value increases by 1 after the action resolves.
